title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER MILWAUKIE MEDICAL CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 10330 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 325 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday, 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Tuesday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm (503) 416-1960 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 416-1960 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. No insurance $25-$50 down payment for first visit. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and other intrepretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday, 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Tuesday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line 75, stop 32nd & Meek is in front of the Providence Milwaukie Healing Place. Bus line 33, stop at SE Harrison & 32nd, two blocks away from location. Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER MILWAUKIE MEDICAL CLINIC
